name: Trans Bus Inc
registry_source: Indiana Secretary of State (INBiz) - record not retrieved
notes: Address and name exact match. SAFER record marked INACTIVE in database (carrier authority MC-166773 revoked 2016 per LoadConnect history; last reinstatement 2002). Carrier classification is 'Authorized for Property' which is unusual for a school bus operator - suggests the entity may have been primarily a freight/charter rather than a school bus operator, or that the property authority was historical and the bus operations were ancillary. Phone 317-214-1147. INBiz lookup not completed via web (requires direct portal access).

name: Empire State Bus Corp
inc_date: 1992 (year established per directory listings; exact NY DOS filing date not retrieved)
registry_source: Business directory listings (hub.biz, LinkedIn); NY DOS Public Inquiry not directly retrieved
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found under 'Empire State Bus Corp' or 'Empire State Bus Corporation' - consistent with NYC school bus operators that run intrastate only (regulated by NYSDOT bus safety program, not FMCSA). Company HQ per multiple directories is 148 Snediker Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11207 (Brownsville) - input address of '101 Shale St, Staten Island' could not be confirmed and may be incorrect or refer to a yard/satellite. Operates NYC DOE school routes in Brooklyn, Queens, Bronx, and Nassau. Established 1992. Phone 718-485-8002. Additional listed facilities: 141 Hinsdale St and 12505 Essex St, Brooklyn.

name: First Step Trans/Thomas Buses
registry_source: NY Department of State - Division of Corporations (via opengovus DOS ID 4198679 / bizprofile)
notes: USDOT 2516795 = FIRST STEPS TRANS INC at exact address 2859 W 37th St, Brooklyn NY 11224 - perfect match. FMCSA cargo classification = Passengers, but operating authority is 'Property' (anomaly; likely school bus carrier using under-100mi intrastate exemption). Power units / drivers reported as 1-2 / 2 are very small numbers in FMCSA but the related entity 'Thomas Buses Inc' (also at 2859 W 37th St, alt 2867 W 15th St) operates the bulk of NYC school bus fleet under the same ownership. Sister entity Thomas Buses Inc established 2002 per CMac. Alphonse Romano also identified as a principal. Reviews indicate active operation as NYC school bus contractor with multiple buses.

name: Pace Transportation Inc
